channel.title: Anthropic News
channel.description: Latest news and announcements from Anthropic

item.title: Building a new enterprise AI services company with Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, and Goldman Sachs
item.description: Building a new enterprise AI services company with Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, and Goldman Sachs

item.title: Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX
item.description: Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX

item.title: Anthropic forms $200 million partnership with the Gates Foundation
item.description: Anthropic forms $200 million partnership with the Gates Foundation

item.title: PwC is deploying Claude to build technology, execute deals, and reinvent enterprise functions for clients
item.description: PwC is deploying Claude to build technology, execute deals, and reinvent enterprise functions for clients

item.title: KPMG integrates Claude across its core business and workforce of more than 276,000 in strategic alliance
item.description: KPMG integrates Claude across its core business and workforce of more than 276,000 in strategic alliance

item.title: Widening the conversation on frontier AI
item.description: Widening the conversation on frontier AI

item.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.7
item.description: Our latest Opus model brings stronger performance across coding, agents, vision, and multi-step tasks, with greater thoroughness and consistency on the work that matters most.

item.title: Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs
item.description: Today, we’re launching Claude Design, a new Anthropic Labs product that lets you collaborate with Claude to create polished visual work like designs, prototypes, slides, one-pagers, and more.

item.title: Claude is a space to think
item.description: We’ve made a choice: Claude will remain ad-free. We explain why advertising incentives are incompatible with a genuinely helpful AI assistant, and how we plan to expand access without compromising user trust.
